justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including 'the Tuesday of next week at 15h', 'earlier on Tuesday, perhaps around 10 AM', and 'Wednesday afternoon', and 'Thursday afternoon, June 11th, around 2 PM'.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternatives when the initial requested times were unavailable, offering to check other times on the same day or another day next week, and then successfully found an appointment on the user's third preference.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent combining information gathering and avoiding unnecessary turns or redundant API queries.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment without any friction points or jargon.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered gracefully after initial unavailability, maintaining full context and intelligently expanding the search based on the user's updated preferences without re-asking information.
